title: hieracium hanburyi f. atraticeps
intro: Hieracium hanburyi f. atraticeps, also known as the 'red hawkweed', is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium hanburyi f. atraticeps include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in tinctures, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
